zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Darell於1454年出生在英國維爾爾時，她的父親Sir George Darrell35歲，母親Margaret Stourton21歲。她於1468年之前與John Seymour結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年在英國英格蘭維爾爾素斯 薩維爾納可 煙雨 布利姆斯拉德 安德 卡德利享年25歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Darell于1454年出生在英国維爾爾时，她的父亲Sir George Darrell35岁，母亲Margaret Stourton21岁。她于1468年之前与John Seymour结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年在英国英格兰維爾爾素斯 薩維爾納可 煙雨 布利姆斯拉德 安德 卡德利享年25岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Darell was born in 1454, in Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir George Darrell, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Stourton, was 21. She married John Seymour before 1468. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1479, in South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in England.

fr.Savernake, Wiltshire, England: South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Darell est née en 1454, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Darrell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stourton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Seymour avant 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1479, à South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Darell 1454 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Darrell 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stourton 21. Sie hat vor 1468 John Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1479 im Alter von 25 Jahren in South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darell è nata il nel 1454 nel Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir George Darrell, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stourton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Seymour prima del 1468. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1479, nel South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darellが1454年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir George Darrellは35歳，母Margaret Stourtonは21歳であった。1468年以前にJohn Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアソウス サバーナク ウィス ブリムスラド アンド カドリーで25歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Savernake, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darell(이)가 1454년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Darrell(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stourton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1468년 이전 John Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darell nasceu em 1454, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Darrell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stourton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Seymour antes 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1479, em South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.Savernake, Wiltshire, England: соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Darell родилась в 1454 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Darrell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stourton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Seymour перед 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1479 г. в местности соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Darell nació en 1454, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Darrell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Stourton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Seymour antes de 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1479, en South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
